sentences.target: Ich suche das Ding schon seit einer Stunde.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə das dɪŋ ʃoːn zaɪ̯t ˈaɪ̯nɐ ˈʃtʊndə/

translations.de: Ich suche das Ding schon seit einer Stunde.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə das dɪŋ ʃoːn zaɪ̯t ˈaɪ̯nɐ ˈʃtʊndə/
translations.en: I’ve been looking for the thing for an hour.
translations.es: Llevo una hora buscando esa cosa.
translations.fr: Je cherche ce truc depuis une heure.
translations.it: Sto cercando quella cosa da un'ora.
translations.ko: 나 그거 한 시간째 찾고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我已经找了那东西一个小时了。
translations.yue: 我已經搵嗰樣嘢一個鐘頭。
translations.ru: Я ищу эту штуку уже час.
translations.pt: Estou procurando essa coisa há uma hora.
translations.he: אני מחפש את הדבר הזה כבר שעה.
translations.vi: Tôi tìm cái đó cả một tiếng rồi.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن ذلك الشيء منذ ساعة.
translations.nl: Ik zoek dat ding al een uur.
translations.uk: Я шукаю ту штуку вже годину.
translations.hu: Már egy órája keresem azt a cuccot.
translations.hi: मैं उस चीज़ को एक घंटे से ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Szukam tej rzeczy już od godziny.
translations.el: Ψάχνω αυτό το πράγμα εδώ και μία ώρα.
translations.nb: Jeg har lett etter den tingen i en time.
translations.id: Aku sudah mencari benda itu selama satu jam.
translations.sv: Jag har letat efter den där grejen i en timme.
translations.ro: Caut chestia aia de o oră.
translations.da: Jeg har ledt efter den der ting i en time.
translations.fi: Olen etsinyt sitä juttua jo tunnin.
translations.ja: あれをもう1時間探してる。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense; predicates the action performed by the subject.
Definite article introducing the object noun; neuter singular (form identical in nominative/accusative).
Neuter noun; direct object of the verb 'suche'.
Temporal/focus adverb meaning 'already'; emphasizes duration with the following prepositional phrase.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a temporal phrase indicating duration from a past point up to now.
Indefinite article in feminine dative singular; modifies 'Stunde' within the prepositional phrase.
Feminine noun in dative singular; object of the preposition 'seit', expressing the time span.

sentences.target: Das Ding kostet heute nur zehn Euro.
sentences.reading: /das dɪŋ ˈkɔstət ˈhɔʏ̯tə nuːɐ tseːn ˈɔʏ̯ʁoː/

translations.de: Das Ding kostet heute nur zehn Euro.
translations.ipa: /das dɪŋ ˈkɔstət ˈhɔʏ̯tə nuːɐ tseːn ˈɔʏ̯ʁoː/
translations.en: That thing costs only ten euros today.
translations.es: Esa cosa hoy cuesta solo diez euros.
translations.fr: Ce truc ne coûte que dix euros aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Quella cosa oggi costa solo dieci euro.
translations.zh-Hans: 那东西今天只要十欧元。
translations.yue: 嗰樣嘢今日只係十歐羅。
translations.ru: Эта штука сегодня стоит всего десять евро.
translations.pt: Essa coisa hoje custa só dez euros.
translations.he: הדבר הזה עולה היום רק עשרה אירו.
translations.tr: Şu şey bugün sadece on avroya satılıyor.
translations.vi: Cái đó hôm nay chỉ có mười euro.
translations.ar: ذلك الشيء يكلف היום عشرة يورو فقط.
translations.nl: Dat ding kost vandaag maar tien euro.
translations.uk: Та штука сьогодні коштує лише десять євро.
translations.hu: Az a cucc ma csak tíz euróba kerül.
translations.hi: वह चीज़ आज सिर्फ़ दस यूरो की है.
translations.pl: Ta rzecz dzisiaj kosztuje tylko dziesięć euro.
translations.el: Αυτό το πράγμα σήμερα κοστίζει μόνο δέκα ευρώ.
translations.nb: Den tingen koster bare ti euro i dag.
translations.id: Benda itu hari ini harganya cuma sepuluh euro.
translations.sv: Den där grejen kostar bara tio euro i dag.
translations.ro: Chestia aia azi costă doar zece euro.
translations.cs: Ta věc dnes stojí jen deset eur.
translations.da: Den der ting koster kun ti euro i dag.
translations.fi: Se juttu maksaa tänään vain kymmenen euroa.
translations.ja: それは今日はたった10ユーロだよ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular marking the subject noun.
Neuter noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense; expresses the price of the subject.
Temporal adverb specifying that the statement applies to today.
Focus/limiting adverb restricting the amount to the following numeral phrase.
Cardinal numeral modifying the currency noun; denotes the amount.
Noun used as a unit of currency; measure complement to the numeral 'zehn'.

translations.en: This thing sounds kind of weird.
translations.fr: Ce truc fait un drôle de bruit.
translations.it: Questa cosa suona un po' strana.
translations.pt: Essa coisa está soando meio estranha.
translations.tr: Bu şey kulağa biraz tuhaf geliyor.
translations.nl: Dat ding klinkt een beetje raar.
translations.hu: Ez a cucc kicsit furán hangzik.
translations.el: Αυτό το πράγμα ακούγεται λίγο περίεργο.
translations.nb: Den tingen høres litt rar ut.
translations.sv: Den här grejen låter lite konstigt.
translations.da: Den her ting lyder lidt mærkelig.
translations.ja: これ、ちょっと変な音がする。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; nominative neuter singular modifying 'Ding' with deictic emphasis.
Neuter noun; subject of the clause.
Finite intransitive verb in present tense; describes the auditory impression of the subject.
Modal adverb hedging the manner/degree of the predication.
Predicative adjective serving as a subject complement with 'klingt'; characterizes how it sounds.

sentences.target: Ich lege das Ding in deine Tasche.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːɡə das dɪŋ ɪn ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈtaʃə/

translations.de: Ich lege das Ding in deine Tasche.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːɡə das dɪŋ ɪn ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈtaʃə/
translations.en: I’m putting the thing in your bag.
translations.es: Voy a poner eso en tu mochila.
translations.fr: Je mets le truc dans ton sac.
translations.it: Metto quella cosa nella tua borsa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把那东西放进你的包里。
translations.yue: 我會將嗰樣嘢擺入你個袋。
translations.ru: Я кладу эту штуку в твою сумку.
translations.pt: Vou colocar essa coisa na sua mochila.
translations.he: אני שם את הדבר הזה בתיק שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi đang bỏ cái đó vào túi của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik stop dat ding in je tas.
translations.uk: Я кладу ту штуку в твою сумку.
translations.hu: Azt a cuccot beteszem a táskádba.
translations.hi: मैं वह चीज़ तुम्हारे बैग में रख रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Wkładam tę rzecz do twojej torby.
translations.el: Βάζω αυτό το πράγμα στην τσάντα σου.
translations.nb: Jeg legger den tingen i vesken din.
translations.id: Aku taruh benda itu di tasmu.
translations.sv: Jag lägger den där grejen i din väska.
translations.ro: Pun chestia aia în geanta ta.
translations.cs: Dávám tu věc do tvé tašky.
translations.da: Jeg lægger den der ting i din taske.
translations.ja: それを君のバッグに入れるね。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite transitive verb in present tense; denotes placing something somewhere.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular introducing the direct object noun.
Neuter noun; direct object of 'lege', the item being placed.
Preposition indicating directional placement; introduces the goal PP (takes accusative with motion).
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular); modifies 'Tasche' and marks possession.
Feminine noun; complement of the preposition 'in' (accusative here due to motion), the destination of placement.

That thing costs only ten euros today.
This thing sounds kind of weird.

Esa cosa hoy cuesta solo diez euros.

Ce truc ne coûte que dix euros aujourd’hui.
Ce truc fait un drôle de bruit.
Je mets le truc dans ton sac.

Quella cosa oggi costa solo dieci euro.
